name: Scheduled Task Created on Multiple Hosts
notes: This rule triggers when a scheduled task has been created on mulitple hosts.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Scheduled Task Creation by a Process
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Scheduled Task Creation by a Process, BB:CategoryDefinition: Scheduled Task Creation
when at least 2 events are seen with the same Command (custom) and different Source IP in 10 minutes
thresholds: when at least 2 events are seen with the same Command (custom) and different Source IP in 10 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Scheduled Task Created on Multiple Hosts on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Scheduled Task Creation by a Process, BB:CategoryDefinition: Scheduled Task Creation
AND when at least 2 events are seen with the same Command (custom) and different Source IP in 10 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Detected a Scheduled Task over Multiple Hosts
Event description: Detected a Scheduled Task over Multiple Hosts
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Command (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
